message:
fix(ci): add GOMAXPROCS=1 to zig cross-compilation builds

Serialize Go package compilation for zig-based targets to prevent
concurrent zig cc invocations from racing on the zig compilation cache.
The AccessDenied error on darwin_amd64 was caused by parallel CC calls
within a single go build, not cross-target races.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Executed-By: beads/crew/emma
Rig: beads
Role: crew

files.patch:
@@ -73,6 +73,7 @@ builds:
     env:
       - CGO_ENABLED=1
       - CC=/tmp/zigcc/cc-x86_64-macos
+      - GOMAXPROCS=1
     tags:
       - gms_pure_go
     goos:
@@ -92,6 +93,7 @@ builds:
     env:
       - CGO_ENABLED=1
       - CC=/tmp/zigcc/cc-aarch64-macos
+      - GOMAXPROCS=1
     tags:
       - gms_pure_go
     goos:
@@ -136,6 +138,7 @@ builds:
     env:
       - CGO_ENABLED=1
       - CC=/tmp/zigcc/cc-aarch64-windows-gnu
+      - GOMAXPROCS=1
     tags:
       - gms_pure_go
     goos:
@@ -161,6 +164,7 @@ builds:
     env:
       - CGO_ENABLED=1
       - CC=/tmp/zigcc/cc-x86_64-freebsd
+      - GOMAXPROCS=1
     tags:
       - gms_pure_go
     goos:
